members.title: Team members
members.inviteHint: Have a colleague sign in to this app and link with this code. Use the same email address as entered for the member here, and the account and member record are merged automatically.
members.readOnly: Only an admin can edit team members.

haveCode.desc: Your inspection company gave you a code.

self.title: Start on my own

request.title: Request an inspection
request.intro: Pick an inspection company on the map or search by name, and send a request.
request.searchPlaceholder: Search an inspection company by name
request.mapUnavailable: The map could not be loaded — use the list below.
request.leadBanner: Your equipment is not linked to an inspection company yet. Request an inspection whenever you like.
